message:
chore(deps): update Cargo workspace dependencies and add error code parity test

- Cargo.toml: workspace-level dependency updates for new search-core
  and conformance features
- Cargo.lock: regenerated lock file reflecting dependency resolution
  changes (previously deleted, now restored with current state)
- crates/mcp-agent-mail-search-core/Cargo.toml: add dependencies for
  search core crate build
- crates/mcp-agent-mail-conformance/tests/error_code_parity.rs: new
  parity test validating that error codes emitted by Rust implementation
  match the Python reference for all tool error paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-# Two-tier search dependencies
+# frankensearch: two-tier hybrid search engine
+frankensearch = { path = "../frankensearch/frankensearch", features = ["hybrid"] }
+frankensearch-core = { path = "../frankensearch/crates/frankensearch-core" }
+frankensearch-embed = { path = "../frankensearch/crates/frankensearch-embed" }

+
+# Two-tier search dependencies (legacy, being replaced by frankensearch)

 wide = "0.7"
 safetensors = "0.5"
@@ -143,4 +150,5 @@ inherits = "release"     # Benchmarks use same optimizations as release
 [patch.crates-io]
 # Force a single asupersync throughout the dependency graph to avoid
 # type-identity mismatches (Cx/Outcome/etc).
+# Uses /dp/ canonical path to match frankensearch's Cargo.toml.
 asupersync = { path = "../asupersync" }
